Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Adopt The Stip For Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GABRIEL GUCHO'S Motion To Adopt The StipULATION For Judgment IS Transferred to Department 403 to be heard Judge Begert on January 13, 2014 at 9 am. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: 403 / Hon. Michael Isaku Begert Clerk: Paulina Huei
